name: chroma-node
description: DaVinci Resolve-inspired color page learning app technical foundation.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist/main/main/main.js dist/main/preload/preload.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json
scripts.test:phase00: vitest run && npm run build && node scripts/verify-phase00.mjs
